summary: Iteration 13 testing for inline editing feature on Courtyards page completed. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All UI tests passed. Inline edit feature working correctly for both subyards and announcements - pencil icons visible, inline forms appear with pre-filled data, Save/Cancel buttons work, Escape key cancels editing.
critical_code_review_comments: InlineEditForm component properly implemented with data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
onKeyDown handler correctly handles Enter (save) and Escape (cancel) keys
PUT /api/subyards/{id} and PUT /api/announcements/{id} endpoints working correctly
Edit buttons have proper data-testid format: courtyard-subyard-edit-{id} and courtyard-announcement-edit-{id}

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All inline editing UI tests passed

seed_data_creation: Backend tests create and cleanup TEST_EDIT_, TEST_PUT_, TEST_DELETE_ prefixed subyards and announcements
context_for_next_testing_agent: Inline editing feature for subyards and announcements is fully working. Edit icons (pencil) show for organizer+ users. Clicking opens inline form with name/description pre-filled. Save updates via PUT API and closes form. Cancel and Escape key close form without saving. Delete buttons continue to work alongside edit buttons.

passed: PUT /api/subyards/{id} updates subyard name and description
PUT /api/announcements/{id} updates announcement title and body
PUT endpoints return 404 for invalid IDs
DELETE /api/subyards/{id} still works with edit feature
DELETE /api/announcements/{id} still works with edit feature
Subyard cards show pencil edit icon for organizer+ users (4 found)
Clicking subyard edit icon shows inline form with current name/description pre-filled
Subyard inline form has Save and Cancel buttons
Clicking Cancel hides the inline form without saving
Pressing Escape key cancels inline editing
Clicking Save updates the subyard and closes the form
Announcement cards show pencil edit icon for organizer+ users (2 found)
Clicking announcement edit icon shows inline form with title/body pre-filled
Announcement inline form has Save and Cancel buttons
Announcement Cancel button closes form without saving
Delete buttons still work alongside edit buttons (4 subyard delete, 2 announcement delete)
